ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configuration_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "constant_name" TEXT /* Name of the constant (e.g., gl.PACK_ROW_LENGTH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Allowed values for the parameter */,
  "specified_in" TEXT /* Specification where the parameter is defined */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value the parameter can take */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value the parameter can take */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the parameter is required */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the parameter is deprecated */,
  "deprecated_version" TEXT /* Version in which the parameter was deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived, paused) */,
  "owner_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the project */,
  "last_deployed_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last deployed */,
  "git_repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the Git repository associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the environment belongs to */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Development, Production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, archived, paused) */,
  "last_deployed_date" TEXT /* Date when the environment was last deployed */,
  "deployed_version" TEXT /* Version of the project deployed in the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the configuration belongs to */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "set_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was set */,
  "set_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the configuration is active */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the configuration is the default for the environment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_set_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the configuration */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user's role in the project is active */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last accessed the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments_users" (
  "env_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment-user mapping */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the environment (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user's role in the environment is active */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last accessed the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_users_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration change log */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was changed */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the configuration */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the configuration change */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the change was automated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
